title: Thin Page Parent Strengthening Log — Phase 20.6
principle: Before or alongside any sitemap removal of thin variants, the parent calculator pages must be fully strengthened to absorb the authority transfer.

checks.title_meta: PENDING — needs review for CTR optimization (parent calculator should have strongest title)
checks.short_answer: PENDING — add schema FAQ/short answer for 'what is my monthly payment' queries
checks.calculator_cta: PENDING — verify calculator is prominent above the fold

internal_links_needed: From thin loan variants → loan-calculator (contextual link: 'Try the full loan calculator')

checks.title_meta: REVIEW_NEEDED — parent must have stronger title than thin variants. Current thin variant titles use aggressive hooks that may outcompete parent.

parents_audited.internal_links_status: 12 internal links added Jun 11 (mortgage rates, hungary rate cut, new federal housing). Good — additional contextual links from thin variants → parent recommended.

parents_audited.canonical_note: CANONICAL URL is /calculators/compound-interest (NOT compound-interest-calculator — that URL is unknown to Google)

checks.title_meta: REVIEW_NEEDED — parent must have strongest title. Thin compound variants currently have aggressive 'See YOUR Compound Growth' hooks.
checks.canonical_issue: URL Inspection API shows /calculators/compound-interest-calculator is UNKNOWN to Google. The live URL is /calculators/compound-interest. Verify all internal links point to /calculators/compound-interest.

parents_audited.internal_links_status: Existing safe transfer plan (Phase 20.1) mapped compound-100k, compound-500k to compound-interest. Internal links need verification.

next_actions.immediate: Verify compound-interest-calculator vs compound-interest canonical URL. Update all internal links to point to the correct canonical /calculators/compound-interest.
next_actions.priority: Strengthen all 3 parent calculators with title/meta review, FAQ, short answer, and calculator CTA before any sitemap removal.
next_actions.internal_links: Add contextual internal links from thin variants to parent calculators (e.g., 'Use the full [Loan Calculator] for custom terms').

important_discovery: compound-interest-calculator URL is UNKNOWN to Google. The correct canonical URL is /calculators/compound-interest. This means any internal links pointing to compound-interest-calculator are pointing to a URL Google doesn't know about — wasting link equity.
rule: Parent page strengthening MUST be completed before sitemap removal of thin variants.
